title: A train delay
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: I was travelling to visit my aunt last weekend when my train was delayed. The announcement said there was a problem (27) the line ahead, so we had to wait at the station. Some passengers looked annoyed, but most people stayed calm. I used the time to buy a drink and read a magazine. After about half an hour, a member of staff came to explain what was happening. She spoke clearly, which helped everyone understand the situation (28) getting too worried. The delay was shorter (29) I had expected, and we soon continued our journey. When I arrived, my aunt was waiting outside the station. I apologised (30) being late, but she said it was not my fault. We spent the afternoon walking around the town and talking (31) family news. Although the journey had started badly, the rest of the day went (32) well.
